title: H5P question-type exporter
context: H5P is an MIT-licensed open-source interactive content framework with a large install base on Moodle and WordPress. If H5P-based OER platforms (e.g. Pressbooks, Open edX with H5P plugin) enter scope as adoption targets, an H5P exporter would allow banks to be distributed in H5P's Multichoice/Question Set format. H5P's .h5p format is not QTI; it is platform-plugin-bound. This exporter is conditional on H5P-based platforms confirming adoption interest.
objective: Implement an H5P exporter that converts canonical banks to H5P Question Set format for distribution via Moodle/WordPress/Pressbooks H5P installations.
acceptanceCriteria: Projects a canonical bank to valid H5P Question Set format for supported item types.
Unsupported item types (beyond H5P Multichoice/True-False) explicitly flagged; no silent loss.
Golden fixtures and CI tests provided.
At least one real H5P import round-trip verified in a Moodle or WordPress H5P installation.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commits DCO signed-off.
resources: H5P documentation (Multichoice, Question Set content types)
output: A CI-integrated H5P exporter (MIT-licensed Node package) with golden fixtures and verified real import round-trip.
